news.paragraph: Johnson & Johnson is experiencing positive momentum following an upgrade from Leerink Partners, which raised its price target to $265. The company is currently focused on growth through blockbuster drug bets and a strategic shift in its immunology portfolio. These product-driven developments are key factors for traders to monitor.
headlines: JNJ gets Wall Street boost as blockbuster drug bets ignite growth hopes
Leerink Partners Upgrades Johnson & Johnson to Outperform From Market Perform, Adjusts PT to $265 From $252
